LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING DISMISSAL AND ENTERING JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING DISMISSAL AND ENTERING JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE BANK IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT JENNIFER LEGGIO IN THE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $8,502.07 PLUS COSTS OF $538.95. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendant; Notice Of Submission Of Motion; Declaration Of Lisa D. Dubowski; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Int Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. 415-681-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff.
No other Appearnce.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Entering Judgment Against Defendant.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank's motion for order vacating dismissal and entering judgment against defendant is granted. No opposition filed. The Bank is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Jennifer Leggio in the principal amount of $8,502.07 plus costs of $538.95.

Order and judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
